hooks.command: bash -c 'tool=codex; root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then tool=claude; root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; fi; bash "$root/hooks/session-start.sh" "$tool"'
bash -c 'tool=codex; root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then tool=claude; root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; fi; bash "$root/hooks/edit-streak.sh" "$tool"'
